title: Address Activity Scanner
description: Discover every chain a wallet address is active on with a single API call — returns all chains where the address has had transactions, with the last seen timestamp per chain.
useCase: Build the first screen of a multi-chain wallet app — discover which chains a user is active on before fetching balances, saving API credits by only querying active chains.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to scan for activity across all chains
